name: liquid-hero
title: Liquid Hero
description: Hero cinematic con liquid glass, profundidad y preview de producto.

files.content:
import { ArrowRight, Sparkles } from "lucide-react" import type { ReactNode } from "react" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { LiquidGlass } from "@/components/ui/liquid-glass" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" export function LiquidHero({ title = "Build interfaces that feel alive.", description = "A cinematic hero with layered liquid glass, sharp hierarchy, and a preview surface ready for modern product pages.", primaryAction, secondaryAction, preview, className, }: { title?: string description?: string primaryAction?: ReactNode secondaryAction?: ReactNode preview?: ReactNode className?: string }) { return (

{title}

{description}

{secondaryAction ? ( ) : null}
{preview ?? (
liquid-ui.app

Liquid system

Depth, motion and reusable glass surfaces without hiding the real UI.

)}
) }
